AxmCarService/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 3.1.2 to 3.4.2 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update the project's Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Change the project packaging type to WAR to support deployment in external servlet containers.
Add spring-jdbc dependency for direct JDBC access capabilities.
Add jakarta.servlet-api dependency to explicitly manage servlet API version.
Re-add spring-boot-starter-data-jpa with an explicit version, previously removed or managed differently.
Add spring-boot-starter-mail dependency to enable email sending functionality.
Add commons-lang3 dependency for utility classes.
Add jakarta.mail dependency for JavaMail API support.
Add java-jwt dependency for JWT token handling.
Add jakarta.validation-api dependency for bean validation support.
Add Maven profiles for dev and prod environments to manage active Spring profiles.
Correct the groupId typo in the maven-shade-plugin exclusion for Lombok.
Add maven-compiler-plugin configuration, though it sets source/target to 17 which conflicts with the java.version property.
Add maven-war-plugin to support the new WAR packaging type.

.idea/compiler.xml.general_idea: Update the module name in IntelliJ compiler configuration from AxmCarService to AnaximStore to reflect the project rename.

.idea/modules.xml.general_idea: Rename the IntelliJ IDEA module references from 'AxmCarService' to 'AnaximStore' to reflect the project rebranding.
.idea/modules.xml.human_impl: Changed fileurl and filepath attributes in .idea/modules.xml from AxmCarService to AnaximStore

AxmCarService/src/main/resources/applica.general_idea: Removed hardcoded database connection details to support environment-specific configuration profiles.
AxmCarService/src/main/resources/applica.human_impl: Removed spring.datasource.url, username, password, and driver properties.

AxmCarService/src/main/resources/applica.general_idea: Removed hardcoded JPA and Hibernate settings to allow profile-based database dialect and DDL configuration.
AxmCarService/src/main/resources/applica.human_impl: Removed spring.jpa.database-platform, hibernate.dialect, and ddl-auto properties.

AxmCarService/src/main/resources/applica.general_idea: Configured the application to activate a specific profile (dev) instead of using default global settings.
Disabled automatic SQL initialization on startup, likely moving schema management to Flyway/Liquibase or profile-specific scripts.
